description_long: This backpack features a bold, geometric design with a striking black starburst pattern on a light gray background, visible on both the front and back panels. The front side is adorned with two circular motifs resembling eyes, a stitched mouth-like detail, and a striped lower section, giving it a playful, almost face-like appearance. The main body is primarily light gray with black accents, including the base and decorative elements. Two wide, flat shoulder straps extend from the top to the bottom, and a sturdy handle is positioned at the top for easy carrying. The backpack appears to have a main compartment accessed by a zipper running along the top edge, as well as a smaller front pocket with a horizontal zipper. The overall construction suggests a mix of synthetic fabric and plastic, typical for urban backpacks, with a semi-soft, matte finish.
description: A light gray and black backpack with bold geometric and face-like decorative patterns, featuring wide straps and multiple zippered compartments.
description_view_0: Back view showing the black starburst pattern and the two wide shoulder straps.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the backpack's depth, the side profile of the straps, and the top handle.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the face-like decorative elements, striped lower section, and both main and front zippered compartments.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile and strap structure.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, flat shoulder straps, likely adjustable, with no visible padding or chest strap; a single top handle is also present.
attribute_zipper_placement: One zipper runs along the top edge for the main compartment; another horizontal zipper is located on the front pocket.
attribute_pocket_configuration: One main compartment accessed from the top, one external front pocket with a horizontal zipper; no side or mesh pockets visible.
attribute_decorative_elements: Black starburst pattern on the back, face-like decorative elements with circular motifs and stitched mouth on the front, and a striped lower front section.
